title: Micro-Influencer Agreement Gen
problem_or_desire: Excessive manual effort preparing contracts and performance requirements for smaller-scale influencers
core_concept: Modular contract generator for barter/equity influencer deals.
proposed_approach: A tool providing modular contract templates for small-scale influencer partnerships, focusing on barter and equity terms.
prototype_scope: A PDF contract engine with adjustable variables. | Draft modular contract templates.; Create a simple PDF generator.; Test with 3 creators.; Gather feedback.

title: Polyglot Plaza
problem_or_desire: Low retention rates caused by repetitive and dry grammar exercises
core_concept: Massively parallel text adventure where inventory management items are earned exclusively through accurate contextual sentence translation.
proposed_approach: A shared hub city map where dialogue between automated shopkeepers and NPCs prompts players to input simple phrases in their target language.
prototype_scope: A simple market vendor area with one 'Bartering' minigame that unlocks trade items.

title: Dialect Detective
problem_or_desire: Difficulty understanding regional accents and slang
core_concept: A mystery game where clues are hidden in audio clips of various regional dialects
proposed_approach: Use a branching narrative structure where players must correctly identify slang terms to unlock dialogue options
prototype_scope: One mystery scene with three audio clips and a multiple-choice dialogue interface

title: Sensory-Blind Catering Experiences
target_user: Office event organizers targeting high social engagement
problem_or_desire: Traditional group events often focus too heavily on conversation distractants over menu intentionality
core_concept: Focus on taste and texture through sensory deprivation.
proposed_approach: A curated tasting event where participants are blindfolded to focus on flavor profiles.
prototype_scope: Host one 20-person event with a blindfolded tasting menu. | Design a 6-course tasting menu; Recruit 20 participants; Host the event; Collect qualitative feedback

title: Personal Flavor Genome Modeler
problem_or_desire: Inability to predict which meals currently maximize palatability vs nausea
core_concept: Customized food delivery based on individual sensory feedback.
proposed_approach: A personalized snack subscription service based on user-reported flavor preferences and feedback.
prototype_scope: Deliver 3 snack boxes to 5 users, adjusting subsequent boxes based on their written feedback. | Create a flavor preference survey; Source 5 snack varieties; Deliver and collect feedback; Iterate on box contents

title: Vendor Selection Orchestrator
problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding legitimate, non-spammy shipping and fulfillment partners
core_concept: A verified private dashboard of filtered vendors based on store volume metrics
proposed_approach: Manual white-glove curation of pre-negotiated volume tiers
prototype_scope: Google Sheets landing page portal connecting 5 retailers to vetted 3PL vendors

title: The Coffee Pairing Concierge
problem_or_desire: Difficulty matching coffee profiles to specific dessert courses
core_concept: A service that curates and delivers small-batch coffee beans specifically roasted to complement a user's planned menu
proposed_approach: Digital questionnaire about the menu followed by curated bean delivery
prototype_scope: A landing page for 10 test users to receive a pairing recommendation and sample pack

title: QuietQuest
target_user: Remote professionals who work in shared urban noise environments
problem_or_desire: Lack of data on acoustic environments of candidate public coffee shops for focus time
core_concept: Acoustic sentiment monitoring based on non-private noise profile crowd-sourcing
proposed_approach: Visualization dashboard identifying specific coffee shops through public metadata metrics about business hours
prototype_scope: Web mapping layer highlighting locations coded by assumed levels of background conversational traffic intensity

title: Office Sensory Calibration Service
problem_or_desire: Inconsistent coffee quality leading to employee dissatisfaction
core_concept: A recurring service that calibrates office brewing equipment and adjusts grind settings based on water chemistry analysis
proposed_approach: Monthly technician visits to test water pH and machine extraction efficiency
prototype_scope: Calibration service for 5 office breakrooms in a single business park

title: Gesture-Based Spellcaster
core_concept: Combat system requiring complex screen-drawing gestures to cast specific spells
proposed_approach: Implement a gesture recognition engine that maps specific shapes to spell effects in real-time combat
prototype_scope: A combat arena with three distinct spells triggered by drawing specific shapes on the screen
